title: Best Call Transcription Software & Apps of 2025: Our Picks - Allo
text: Allô’s AI automatically records your calls, generates summaries and transcripts, takes notes, updates your CRM, sends SMS messages, handles after-hours calls, and remembers every word so your team can access the information later. **Rev Call Recorder** is a phone call transcription app for iPhone that lets you record both incoming and outgoing calls with no time limits or subscriptions. It supports automatic call recording for both phone and VoIP apps (like WhatsApp, Skype, Zoom) and offers transcription features for recorded calls. * Dialpad pricing starts at $15/user/month for the Standard plan, which includes unlimited calls, HD meetings, built-in messaging, live transcriptions, and AI-powered call summaries. * For **VoIP calls** (Zoom, Meet, etc.), apps like **Allô**, **Dialpad**, or **Otter.ai** can record and transcribe in real-time.
